_meta.description: Manual overlay merged into CODE_INDEX.json by scripts/build_code_index.py. Edit per-file entries here; the generator preserves your curated 'purpose', 'sections', 'private_helpers', 'key_fields', and 'depends_on'.
_meta.usage: Run `python scripts/build_code_index.py --write` to regenerate CODE_INDEX.json after editing this file or after adding/renaming/deleting source files. The pre-commit hook runs `--check` and blocks commits whose code changes have not been regenerated.

architecture.overview: NCE Events is a Frappe app that renders configurable multi-panel data explorer pages. It has a Python API layer and two frontend generations: V1 (vanilla JS class-based) and V2 (Vue 3 SFC with Vite build). Both share SMS/Email dialogs from V1. Depends on nce_sync app. V2 supports optional frozen Form Dialogs for editing panel rows without leaving the panel page. V2 ships as one Vue bundle mounted by three Frappe Pages: legacy /app/panel-page-v2 (unfiltered), /app/panel-page-mirrored (doctype_source=Mirror), /app/panel-page-native (doctype_source=Native). Each page passes a mode + label into the SPA via app.provide; the root WP Tables panel filter and the Panel Actions scope filter both derive from that mode. See Docs/handoff_panel_page_split.md.
architecture.data_flow: Frappe Page (panel_page / panel_page_v2) → JS/Vue → frappe.call() → api/panel_api_pkg/, api/messaging.py, api/tags.py, api/reports.py, api/form_dialog/ → Frappe ORM → MariaDB
key_patterns: V2 Vue app built separately: npm run build in public/js/panel_page_v2/ then bench build
V2 reuses V1 SmsDialog, EmailDialog, and ai_tools.js at runtime — do NOT duplicate
Python helpers follow snake_case private convention (_helper_name) — check AGENTS.md before adding
frozenset used for fieldtype/fieldname skip sets
Tag system uses Jinja template tags with gender-conditional pronouns
Form Dialog: frozen_meta_json (snapshot of frappe.get_meta fields) is parsed by parseLayout.js + rendered by PanelFormDialog.vue. Only DocTypes in WP Tables are eligible.
Form Dialog buttons: script text is copied from Desk at capture/rebuild time — not live-linked. Rebuild is manual.

Panel Page split (Mirror / Native): one Vue bundle, three Frappe Pages. main.js mount(selector, opts) provides panelMode + panelLabel; App.vue injects them, applies { doctype_source: panelMode } to the root usePanel, and passes scope: panelMode to usePanelActions. Cross-page navigation is a Panel Action of type Client Script using switch_page(slug), implemented as a full-reload window.location.assign for KISS state reset. See Docs/handoff_panel_page_split.md.

NCE Sync mirror refresh (separate app): whitelisted nce_sync.api.sync_doctype_rows (by doc names) and nce_sync.api.sync_linked_doctype_rows (rebuild child rows for one parent Link). Full call shapes, enqueue helpers, and permission notes: architecture.nce_sync_mirror_refresh_apis.

ThemeSwatchPicker (Themes app): Desk Page Panel Colours tab — Backgrounds: themeSwatchPicker per *_bg_class slot; Lines & borders: width Select + Color pick; Tables: header/zebra/divider previews from get_theme_table_tokens (NCE Theme theme_json). Runtime: panelChromeClasses.js resolves bg + border slots; theme-table CSS bundle on PanelTable and Form Dialog related grids (headers, zebra rows, cell dividers); empty panel table overrides defer to theme-table tokens.

nce_sync_mirror_refresh_apis.source_app: nce_sync Frappe app (dependency of NCE Events; implementation not in this repo).
nce_sync_mirror_refresh_apis.requirements: Target DocType must be on WP Tables as Mirrored or Linked with a real WordPress table.
nce_sync_mirror_refresh_apis.permissions: sync_doctype_rows requires read on the DocType. sync_linked_doctype_rows requires read and delete.
nce_sync_mirror_refresh_apis.behavior: Whitelisted methods return immediately after queueing; Desk shows toasts when the background worker finishes.
nce_sync_mirror_refresh_apis.whitelist_vs_enqueue: Whitelisted frappe.call uses frappe.session.user for permission checks (read; linked sync also delete). For cron or other contexts without a reliable session user, enqueue nce_sync.utils.data_sync.run_sync_doctype_rows_job or run_sync_linked_doctype_rows_job with queue default, timeout (e.g. 3600), and explicit user= so completion toasts have a recipient. Use whitelist when you want framework permission checks; use direct frappe.enqueue only when you deliberately bypass whitelist and enforce your own rules.

args.names: List of row names, e.g. ['101','102']; some callers may pass JSON.stringify([...]) if supplying a string

nce_sync.api.sync_doctype_rows.response: r.message typically includes queued, doctype, row_count, etc.

args.link_field: Fieldname of the Link field on that child (string)
args.link_value: Parent name stored in that Link, e.g. EVT-00001 (string)

nce_sync.api.sync_linked_doctype_rows.response: Same pattern — queued summary in r.message

nce_sync_mirror_refresh_apis.examples_desk_js:
frappe.call({ method: 'nce_sync.api.sync_doctype_rows', args: { doctype: 'Your Mirrored DocType', names: ['101', '102'] }, callback(r) { if (!r.exc) console.log(r.message); } });

frappe.call({ method: 'nce_sync.api.sync_linked_doctype_rows', args: { doctype: 'Your Child Mirrored DocType', link_field: 'event', link_value: 'EVT-00001' }, callback(r) { if (!r.exc) console.log(r.message); } });
nce_sync_mirror_refresh_apis.examples_server_session_python:
frappe.call({ "method": "nce_sync.api.sync_doctype_rows", "doctype": "Your Mirrored DocType", "names": ["101", "102"] })

frappe.call({ "method": "nce_sync.api.sync_linked_doctype_rows", "doctype": "Your Child Mirrored DocType", "link_field": "event", "link_value": "EVT-00001" })

Alternative: frappe.get_attr("nce_sync.api.sync_doctype_rows")(...) with the same keyword arguments.

nce_events/__init__.py.purpose: Frappe app package root for nce_events (version string, app metadata).

nce_events/api/__init__.py.purpose: API package marker — endpoints live in submodules (panel_api_pkg, form_dialog, messaging, etc.).

nce_events/api/credentials.py.purpose: Read credential_config JSON from API Connector doctype — returns auth_pattern, base_url, and required credential values. Fallback auth_type map includes Secret (api_secret only, auth_pattern shared_secret).
sections: Secret auth fallback (api_secret only, no api_key)

nce_events/api/derived_fields.py.purpose: DocType-agnostic derived-field evaluation: compose WP Tables column_mapping specs with sql_eval substitution for panel/computed use.

nce_events/api/evaluations.py.purpose: Evaluations API — enrollment rows for event-scoped rating Kanban (get_event_enrollments whitelist).

nce_events/api/events_publish.py.purpose: WooCommerce Events product publish/update: normalize Events doc fields, REST API via woocommerce_client, slugify and track WC product linkage on save hooks.

nce_events/api/exchange.py.purpose: Enrollment product exchange and refund whitelisted endpoints (execute_product_exchange, execute_product_refund).
sections: Product refund with optional cancellation fee

nce_events/api/form_dialog/__init__.py.purpose: Form Dialog API package — Phase 4 split of the original 1233-LOC form_dialog_api.py module (the deprecated shim was removed in Phase 12). Re-exports submodule public + underscore-prefixed names so callers can resolve them at the package root.

nce_events/api/form_dialog/_fd_capture_m.purpose: Frozen meta capture helpers: tab skeleton from frozen fields (FD_LEAD_TAB_ANCHOR), client-script capture from Client Script records and app-level doctype .js files, frozen_meta_json build, and tab_notes sync on rebuild.

nce_events/api/form_dialog/_fd_fetch_fro.purpose: fetch_from field enrichment — copies display-relevant properties (fieldtype, options) from linked DocType source fields into frozen Form Dialog field dicts.

nce_events/api/form_dialog/_fd_gating.py.purpose: Form Dialog gating: WP Tables validation, System Manager guard, capture-schema readiness check, and panel required-value emptiness check.

nce_events/api/form_dialog/_fd_inline_ch.purpose: Inline child-table helpers for Form Dialog capture: table_fields_for_capture_wizard picker, inline-child argument parsing, row dict build, and inline_child_tables child-row sync.

nce_events/api/form_dialog/_fd_related.p.purpose: Related-doctype helpers: hop-chain normalization/walk, related-doctypes argument parsing, child-row dict build and sync, related-row filters, column derivation, and get_list field sanitization.

nce_events/api/form_dialog/_fd_script_to.purpose: Script tool group argument parsing and script_tool_groups child-row sync on Form Dialog capture/rebuild.

nce_events/api/form_dialog/_helpers.py.purpose: Back-compat façade re-exporting all form_dialog domain submodules (_fd_gating, _fd_fetch_from, _fd_related, _fd_inline_children, _fd_script_tools, _fd_capture_meta). Existing call sites import from here unchanged.

nce_events/api/form_dialog/action_regist.purpose: Allow-listed server methods for Form Dialog portal row buttons. PORTAL_ACTION_METHODS maps action keys to dotted_path targets resolved via frappe.get_attr at call time.

nce_events/api/form_dialog/button_visibi.purpose: Evaluate Form Dialog footer button visibility for V2 panel: hide_if modes (never/not_saved/saved/sql_expression) for custom buttons and default Submit.

nce_events/api/form_dialog/capture.py.purpose: Form Dialog schema-capture endpoints: capture/rebuild a Form Dialog by freezing the live DocType meta from Desk (fields + client_scripts), get_form_dialog_definition for the V2 panel renderer, and list_form_dialogs_for_doctype for the Desk Page Panel Dialogs tab. frozen_meta_json stores { fields: [...], client_scripts: [...] }.

nce_events/api/form_dialog/edit_conditio.purpose: Validate and evaluate Form Dialog related-tab edit conditions (implicit IF SQL on root DocType). Empty expression allows edit; truthy IF disables edit/add/remove. Supports pending unsaved root field values, label-to-fieldname resolution for Desk picker, and get_edit_condition_fields whitelist.

nce_events/api/form_dialog/portal_action.purpose: Run allow-listed portal actions from Form Dialog related/inline child grids: get_portal_actions_for_row, save_related/inline portal actions, execute via action_registry.

nce_events/api/form_dialog/portal_fields.purpose: Portal-field editor endpoints for Form Dialog Related DocType rows: build the editor row list from frozen child meta and persist user-curated portal_field_config (show/editable/sort_rank/sort_dir).

nce_events/api/form_dialog/related_rows..purpose: Related-rows endpoints for the panel-V2 Form Dialog: fetch and save child-DocType rows shown in related tabs, gated by the portal_field_config persisted on the Form Dialog Related DocType row.

nce_events/api/form_dialog/save.py.purpose: Server-side Form Dialog document save (save_form_dialog_document) with optional fetch_from writeback. Honours per-DocType + Page Panel required_fields, then optionally pushes fetch_from values back into linked source records before saving.

nce_events/api/form_dialog/search.py.purpose: Form Dialog FileMaker-style find: match rows by frozen-meta searchable fields against user criteria; resolves Page Panel via page_panel_lookup.

nce_events/api/form_dialog/sync_related..purpose: Post-save linked DocType sync for Form Dialog WP read-back: trigger_linked_sync_for_dialog_readback queues nce_sync linked-row pulls before Show changes.

nce_events/api/hierarchy_explorer.py.purpose: Hierarchy explorer backend — tree traversal for hierarchical doctypes

nce_events/api/llm.py.purpose: LLM/AI integration helpers for AI tools panel feature

nce_events/api/messaging.py.purpose: Email and SMS messaging: preview Jinja-rendered message, send bulk panel message, get email accounts

nce_events/api/panel_actions.py.purpose: Panel Action endpoints — list visible Panel Actions for the current user (role-gated and scope-filtered), capture/load Panel Action Form Dialog definitions, and resolve dynamic DocType targets for showDt actions. get_panel_actions(scope) returns only actions whose Scope matches the requested page scope ('Mirror' / 'Native') plus the universal 'Both' scope; called with scope=null returns everything (used by legacy panel-page-v2).

nce_events/api/panel_api_pkg/__init__.py.purpose: Panel API package — Phase 5 split of the original 1093-LOC panel_api.py module (the deprecated shim was removed in Phase 12). Re-exports submodule public + underscore-prefixed names so callers can resolve them at the package root.

nce_events/api/panel_api_pkg/_helpers.py.purpose: Internal helpers shared by the panel_api package: auto-detect email/SMS fields, find link fields, title case conversion, safe filename generation, WP Tables label map, link field extraction, gender field detection, required fieldnames extraction, CSV parsing.

nce_events/api/panel_api_pkg/computed_co.purpose: Computed columns — extract unstored SQL-expression fields from Page Panel config, evaluate expressions per row with {fieldname} substitution, and execute custom SQL expressions.

nce_events/api/panel_api_pkg/core_filter.purpose: Core filter SQL building — WHERE clause construction with raw SQL expressions, query execution with core filters, user filter application (field, op, value conditions), and SQL table-name prefix normalization.

nce_events/api/panel_api_pkg/discovery.p.purpose: Child doctype discovery — find direct-child DocTypes with Link fields pointing to a root, multi-hop child discovery (1/2/3-hop) for Form Dialog picker, field metadata extraction (fieldname, label, fieldtype, Link options), and diagnostic child lookup.

nce_events/api/panel_api_pkg/format_rule.purpose: Panel column format-rule SQL validation and resolution: tokenize condition_sql against root/related field maps, validate against allowed_fields whitelist, return resolved SQL for Page Panel computed styling.
sections: Token resolution and SQL keyword guard

nce_events/api/panel_api_pkg/page_panel_.purpose: Resolve Page Panel documents by root_doctype (not autoname name): page_panel_docname_for_root, get_page_panel_doc_for_root. Used by form_dialog search and panel APIs when root_doctype is the stable key.

nce_events/api/panel_api_pkg/panel_confi.purpose: Page Panel config dict construction: _panel_config_from_doc, theme_slug resolution, per-surface chrome bg/fg slots, derived ORDER BY for format-rule SQL wrapper, gender tint metadata.

nce_events/api/panel_api_pkg/panel_data..purpose: Panel data read endpoints — get_panel_config, get_panel_data (hot path), get_other_page_panels, copy_panel_colours, export_panel_data whitelist wrapper, get_theme_slug_for_link, and get_theme_table_tokens (Desk Colours tab previews). Config/export logic lives in panel_config.py and panel_export.py; _panel_config_from_doc re-exported for sql.py.

nce_events/api/panel_api_pkg/panel_expor.purpose: Panel CSV export implementation: filtered_row_names parsing, cell serialization, public file write. Called by panel_data.export_panel_data whitelist (path must stay on panel_data module).

nce_events/api/panel_api_pkg/sql.py.purpose: Panel SQL generation — build SELECT [LEFT JOIN...] queries for a panel with field selection and link field resolution, generate and save panel SQL for inspection, persist core filter and order_by on Page Panel records.

nce_events/api/panel_api_pkg/theme_slug..purpose: Resolve Page Panel NCE Theme Link values to Active theme slugs for data-nce-theme scoping. Empty link falls back to site default (is_default=1); missing/inactive docs return None.

nce_events/api/panel_api_pkg/theme_table.purpose: Read NCE Theme table chrome tokens (header bg, zebra row colours, row/col divider colours and width tiers) from theme_json for Page Panel Colours tab Tables previews and Desk override defaults.

nce_events/api/reports.py.purpose: Report generation — panel data as structured report output

nce_events/api/spa_page.py.purpose: SPA Page Definition boot config: resolve_spa_switch for Panel Actions switch_page(), get_spa_page_config, list_spa_pages_for_ui, inactive slug list.

nce_events/api/sql_eval.py.purpose: Generic SQL expression evaluation with {fieldname} substitution, literal splitting, and per-doctype token allowlist (evaluate_sql_expressions_api whitelist).

nce_events/api/sync_status.py.purpose: NCE Sync job polling for V2 panel: is_doctype_sync_busy (Redis gate) and get_sync_job_status (RQ status by job_id).

nce_events/api/tags.py.purpose: Jinja tag generation for email/SMS templates — pronoun tags, gender-conditional values

nce_events/api/tests/__init__.py.purpose: nce_events API unit test package root.

nce_events/api/tests/api/form_dialog/__i.purpose: Form Dialog API test package marker.

nce_events/api/tests/api/form_dialog/tes.purpose: Unit tests for form_dialog button_visibility SQL hide modes and get_form_dialog_footer_visibility.
Unit tests for form_dialog capture/rebuild and get_form_dialog_definition endpoints.
Unit tests for form_dialog edit_condition: validate_edit_condition guards, evaluate_edit_condition truthy/falsy/pending_root_values, resolve_edit_condition_labels token rewriting.
Unit tests for form_dialog _helpers façade and _fd_* domain modules (gating, related, capture meta).
Unit tests for form_dialog portal_actions run_portal_action allow-list execution.
Unit tests for form_dialog portal_fields editor normalization and related portal config.
Unit tests for form_dialog related_rows fetch/save and portal column gating.

nce_events/api/tests/api/panel_api_pkg/t.purpose: Unit tests for panel_api_pkg child-doctype discovery, multi-hop link paths (1/2/3-hop), and get_multi_hop_children classification.
Unit tests for theme_slug.resolve_theme_slug (Active slug, site default fallback, missing/inactive docs).
Unit tests for theme_table_tokens.get_theme_table_tokens divider tiers, border classes, and theme_json colour resolution.

nce_events/api/tests/api/test_credential.purpose: Unit tests for credentials.get_credentials secret auth pattern parsing.

nce_events/api/tests/api/test_derived_fi.purpose: Unit tests for derived_fields spec loading and SQL literal splitting.

nce_events/api/tests/api/test_events_pub.purpose: Unit tests for events_publish WooCommerce publish/update payloads, duplicate_event, and delete_event flows.

nce_events/api/tests/api/test_sql_eval.p.purpose: Unit tests for sql_eval expression evaluation and substitution token allowlist.

nce_events/api/tests/api/test_woocommerc.purpose: Unit tests for woocommerce_client REST request helper and base URL normalization.

nce_events/api/tests/api/test_wp_tables_.purpose: Unit tests for wp_tables_mapping column mapping and default field values API.

nce_events/api/tests/test_core_functions.purpose: Unit tests for core SQL/table helpers (physical_table_name, tab prefix, WP query translation).

nce_events/api/tests/test_evaluations.py.purpose: Unit tests for evaluations get_event_enrollments and physical table name resolution.

nce_events/api/tests/test_spa_page.py.purpose: Unit tests for spa_page resolve_spa_switch and SPA Page Definition slug lookup.

nce_events/api/woocommerce_client.py.purpose: Generic WooCommerce REST v3 HTTP client using API Connector credentials (wc_request, get_woocommerce_v3_base_url).

nce_events/api/wp_readback_panel.py.purpose: Panel V2 WP SQL live read-back detection: doctype_has_wp_sql_live_readback returns enabled flag and write_back_refresh_seconds from WP Tables.

nce_events/api/wp_tables_mapping.py.purpose: WP Tables column_mapping and derived SQL spec helpers (get_wp_tables_column_mapping_api, get_wp_tables_default_field_values_api).

nce_events/api/wp_user_switch.py.purpose: WordPress user-switch URL builder for panel row actions (get_wp_switch_url whitelist).

nce_events/hooks.py.purpose: App config: metadata, required_apps (nce_sync), global JS/CSS includes, doctype_js overrides, apps screen entry

nce_events/utils/__init__.py.purpose: Shared Python utilities package marker for nce_events.

nce_events/utils/sql_table.py.purpose: physical_table_name — map DocType name to Frappe tab-prefixed SQL table name.

nce_events/utils/writeback.py.purpose: Optional writeback_fetched_fields for batch/server use. Panel dialog uses save_form_dialog_document instead.

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/card_actio.purpose: Child table of Card Definition — footer action button (label, action_script link to Card Script, sort_order).

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/card_defin.purpose: Card layout definition — composite display card with tabs, fields, actions, graphics

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/card_displ.purpose: Child table of Card Definition — display widget row (layout slot for Card Field / Graphic / etc.).

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/card_field.purpose: Child table of Card Definition — single field display binding (fieldname, label override, format).

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/card_graph.purpose: Child table of Card Definition — image/graphic widget (file URL, alt text, sizing).

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/card_pivot.purpose: Child table of Card Definition — pivot-table widget config (rows/cols/values field bindings).

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/card_porta.purpose: Portal page definition — ordered columns of cards
Child table of Card Definition — portal grid column definition for editable child rows.

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/card_scrip.purpose: Child table of Card Definition — named client script body referenced by Card Action rows.

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/card_tab/.purpose: Child table of Card Definition — tab container grouping display widgets.

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/card_text_.purpose: Child table of Card Definition — static HTML/Markdown text block widget.

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/card_video.purpose: Child table of Card Definition — embedded video widget (URL, poster, autoplay flags).

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/card_web_v.purpose: Child table of Card Definition — iframe/web-viewer widget (URL, height).

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/display_se.purpose: Global display settings singleton for NCE Events UI

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/form_dialo.purpose: Frozen Desk form definition for V2 dialog rendering. One record per named dialog. Stores frozen_meta_json (fields array snapshot from frappe.get_meta), dialog_size, is_active, writeback_on_submit, and child buttons table. Only DocTypes in WP Tables are allowed as target_doctype.

Child table of Form Dialog. Each row is an action button shown in the V2 dialog. Stores a copied button_script (JS) and sort_order. Scripts are copied from Desk Client Scripts manually; rebuild updates them.
Child table of Form Dialog — inline child table tab (child_doctype, portal_field_config, portal_actions).
Child table of Form Dialog — related-doctype tab (child_doctype, link_field, hop_chain, portal_field_config, portal_actions).
Child table of Form Dialog — captured client-script tool tab group (label, sort_order, script bodies).
Child table of Form Dialog — per-tab guidance note shown in V2 dialog tab bar.

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/page_panel.purpose: Core config doctype — one record per root DocType being displayed. Stores column order, filters, gender config, email/SMS fields, computed columns, optional theme palette override (Link NCE Theme), per-surface theme-bg + line/border class slots (Colours tab), table header/zebra/divider overrides, and optional link to a Form Dialog for V2 row editing. Desk UI: page_panel.js tabs Config / Display / Colours / Query / Dialogs; Colours tab: Backgrounds (COLOUR_SLOTS + ThemeSwatchPicker), Lines & borders (BORDER_LINE_SLOTS), Tables section (previews from get_theme_table_tokens + Revert to Theme Defaults).
sections: Colours tab (Backgrounds + Lines & borders + Tables previews)
Display matrix, Query SQL, Form Dialogs tab

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/page_panel.purpose: Child table for SQL-expression computed columns on a panel
Child table of Page Panel — default filter row applied on panel load (fieldname, operator, value).
Child table of Page Panel — per-column conditional cell styling (condition_sql, color, font_weight, last_validated_sql).

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/panel_acti.purpose: Configurable side-panel action shown in the V2 SPA. action_type drives behavior (Form Dialog, Client Script, Show DocType, etc.); role gating is enforced via the Panel Action Role child table. Scope (Both / Mirror / Native, default Both) controls which panel page the action appears on — a Mirror-scoped action only shows on /app/panel-page-mirrored, a Native-scoped one only on /app/panel-page-native; Both shows on every page. Backfilled by patch v0_0_2/set_panel_action_scope_default.
Child table of Panel Action — list of Role names allowed to see and execute the parent action. Empty list means everyone with read on Panel Action can see it.

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/panel_page.purpose: Legacy panel page registry DocType — maps page slug/mode to panel configuration before SPA Page Definition.

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/spa_page_d.purpose: Per-SPA Frappe Page config: page slug, is_active, desk title, panel header text, doctype_source mode (Mirror/Native, blank for legacy), and switch_handler_slug alias. Booted via spa_panel_page_register.js + get_spa_page_config; switch_page(target) resolved by resolve_spa_switch (target = slug, mode, or switch_handler_slug). Inactive SPAs hidden from Panel Actions but direct /app/<slug> still loads.

nce_events/public/js/api_connector_tags..purpose: DocType JS extension for API Connector — tag generation helpers

nce_events/public/js/email_template_tags.purpose: DocType JS extension for Email Template — adds Tag Finder button

nce_events/public/js/enrollments_exchang.purpose: Enrollments data exchange UI — globally included

nce_events/public/js/schema_explorer.js.purpose: Tag Finder V1 — DocType field browser for building Jinja template tags

nce_events/public/js/evaluations/App.vue.purpose: Evaluations Vue root — event-scoped enrollment rating Kanban shell.

nce_events/public/js/evaluations/compone.purpose: Evaluations placeholder lane UI while enrollment data loads.
Evaluations rating Kanban board — drag lanes 0–7 for enrollment rows.

nce_events/public/js/evaluations/composa.purpose: Evaluations composable — load and group enrollment rows by rating for Kanban.

nce_events/public/js/evaluations/main.js.purpose: Evaluations Vite entry — mounts App.vue on Frappe evaluations page.

nce_events/public/js/evaluations/stores/.purpose: Evaluations Pinia-style shell store (useNceEvalShellStore) — active event, layout chrome.

nce_events/public/js/evaluations/utils/f.purpose: Evaluations-local Promise wrapper for frappe.call (mirrors panel_page_v2 frappeCall).

nce_events/public/js/panel_page_v2/App.v.purpose: V2 SPA root: composes PanelFloat + PanelTable for the root WP Tables panel and per-doctype drilled panels, hosts TagFinder/CardModal/PanelFormDialog overlays. Passes chromeConfig (eight theme-bg class fields) to PanelFloat/PanelHeaderToolbar; formDialogChromeConfig from formDialogSourcePanelId scopes viewer dialog theme_slug + dialog_header_bg_class. Uses PanelHeaderToolbar for float headers and useSendDialogs for plain-JS email/SMS (out of chrome scope). Reads injected panelMode + panelLabel for Mirror/Native page split.

nce_events/public/js/panel_page_v2/actio.purpose: Client Script panel action handler — cascade_panels. Calls App.vue cascadePanels to stagger open drilled panel floats diagonally.
Client Script panel action handler — close_all_panels. Calls App.vue closeAllPanels to dismiss drilled panels and overlay dialogs.
Panel action client handler show_dt — open a DocType list in Desk (new tab).

Client Script panel action handler — switch_page(target_spa). Calls resolve_spa_switch then window.location.assign(route). target_spa may be page_slug, doctype_source_mode (Mirror/Native), or switch_handler_slug.

Maps Client Script panel action handler keys to JS handler functions. Each Panel Action with action_type=Client Script declares client_handler like 'switch_page(panel-page-native)'; the registry resolves the key (e.g. 'switch_page') to the handler module.

nce_events/public/js/panel_page_v2/compo.purpose: Side panel showing available actions (email, SMS, AI tools) for selected rows
Reusable theme-aware color picker input used by FormatRuleEditor and panel chrome.
Read-only display widget for card fields
Editable field widget for card form inputs
FileMaker-style Find panel float — criteria entry and found-set browse mode.
Desk-mounted format-rule SQL editor — validate_format_rule, color/font styling, Apply to Page Panel row.
Find mode action bar — New Request, Extend Found Set, Constrain, Cancel Find.
Single Find criterion row — field picker, operator, value input.
Find mode toolbar — perform find, clear criteria, switch browse/criteria phases.
Floating panel chrome — data-nce-theme + dynamic theme-bg and frame border classes from chromeConfig (frame/header/footer).
Panel Form Dialog control — mounts Frappe Date/Time/Datetime control in a div host; v-model sync and read_only/reqd from frozen meta.

V2 form dialog root — composes Header/Body/Footer, usePanelFormDialog + useFormDialogChrome. data-nce-theme + dialogHeaderBgClass from opening panel (renders outside PanelFloat). Opened from panel when form_dialog is set.

Form dialog body orchestrator: renders the tab bar (PanelFormDialogTabBar), iterates tabs, and dispatches each tab to PanelFormDialogRelatedTab (related-doctype tabs), PanelFormScriptToolTab (captured JS tool tabs), or the inline main-tab fields grid (PanelFormField-based). Main tabs: collapsible Section Breaks render as accordion headers (chevron, default collapsed; unlabeled → Un-named Section). Aggregates imperative saveAllRelatedRows / resetRelatedToBaseline across related-tab children for the parent dialog.
Form dialog footer — custom buttons, Cancel, Revert (discard unsaved), Submit.
Form dialog header — title, row nav, close. Dynamic headerBgClass (opening panel dialog_header_bg_class); nav/close inherit fg from bg class.
Form dialog inline child-table tab — portal-editable grid for frozen inline children.

Form dialog related-doctype tab: scrollable rows table with portal-editable cells (Select/Check/number/date/text/textarea), theme-table styling (same NCE Theme table tokens as PanelTable), label-column resizer, schema details panel, save_form_dialog_related_rows on Submit. Exposes saveAllRelatedRows + resetRelatedToBaseline.
Index-keyed tab strip for the form dialog body. Pure presentational; emits update:activeTab.

Single field renderer inside PanelFormDialog. Maps Frappe fieldtype → control element (FormControl, checkbox, select, Link, etc.). Data + options URL renders clickable links (Desk parity). Respects hidden/read_only/reqd and depends_on eval expressions.
Help modal explaining FileMaker-style Find searchable fields in Form Dialog.
Panel Form Dialog control — mounts Frappe Link control in a div host; emits change + link-change for fetch_from; v-model sync.

Mounts a captured JS tool UI into a real DOM container. On mount calls mountTool(tool, containerRef.value) from usePanelFormDialog, which re-runs the script's refresh handler with layout.wrapper pointing to the container so the script can inject its full HTML UI (tab bars, buttons, sections). Used for standard DocType form scripts like page_panel.js that do DOM injection rather than add_custom_button.

Header toolbar inside PanelFloat: click-hint, refresh/filter/sheets/email/sms/find/close, record count. Toolbar buttons inherit fg from header bg class (no hardcoded theme-text-primary-fg); click-hint uses themeBgToFgTonal from chromeConfig.

Scrollable data table with sortable-width columns, link/related-link cells, gender-tint and bold styling, optional per-row email/phone/sms action buttons. Table chrome uses theme-table CSS bundle (header bg, zebra rows, row/col dividers); per-panel col_header_bg_class / row_bg_class overrides apply when set, otherwise defer to theme tokens. Filter widget delegated to PanelTableFilterBar.
Filter widget at the top of PanelTable: column dropdown, op chips, value/date/days-ago inputs, add/remove rows, default-filter seeding. Container uses config.filter_bar_bg_class via panelChromeBg.
SPA page top nav bar — lists active SPA Page Definitions and switch_page targets.
Floating SPA page switcher — quick navigation between registered SPA panels.
Tab navigation bar for switching between panels
Table column cell renderer with tag highlighting
Modal dialog wrapping TagFinder for in-context tag insertion
Tag Finder V2 — Vue port of schema_explorer.js for template tag building
Grid layout container for card widgets
createHandleFetchFrom(allFields, formData) — Link change fetch_from resolution for Panel Form Dialog.
saveFrozenFormDocument — server save_form_dialog_document + writeback_fetches flag.
validateFrozenForm + isFieldVisible/Mandatory/ReadOnly; isVirtualDocField (Frappe is_virtual) forces read-only and skips mandatory checks.
Click-outside-to-close for floating panels and form dialog backdrop (pointer vs mousedown guard).
Find panel state machine — criteria, found set, browse mode, panel API filter wiring.

Two-phase captured-script runner for the Panel Form Dialog. Phase 1 activateScripts(): intercepts window.frappe.ui.form.on, executes each client_scripts entry, runs refresh handlers with a DOM-safe shim (real hidden element for layout.wrapper, Proxy for fields_dict, absorb-Proxy for page). Returns tool tab descriptors — one per add_custom_button group, or a single generic 'Tools' entry for DOM-injection scripts that have no add_custom_button calls. Phase 2 mountTool(tool, domContainer): re-runs refresh with the real visible container so the script renders its full UI (tab bars, buttons, sections). Also provides runOnChange(fieldname) for field-level event handlers.
confirmDiscardIfDirty + createRowNavKeydownHandler for Panel Form Dialog shell.
Display-baseline dirty tracking for Form Dialog main tabs: captures visible control values at load/save, compares on input/change without writing into formData (avoids Frappe date side effects).
V2 composable — form dialog prev/next over the source panel's visible row list; exported panelRowArray for reuse.
createFrozenFormLoad — load seq, resetWhenClosed, load definition + doc + initial fetch_from batch.
V2 composable — stacked Card modals; parseOpenCardOpts for window._nce_open_card. Panel drill calls openCardModal.

V2 composable — load panel config and data, refetch with user_filters. Accepts an optional parentFilter object that is AND-merged into every get_panel_data call (used by App.vue to apply the doctype_source filter on the Mirror / Native pages).

V2 composable — loads the Panel Actions list and runs the click handler. Accepts a scope option ('Mirror' / 'Native' / null) that is forwarded to get_panel_actions so the server returns only actions whose Scope matches the current panel page (plus the universal 'Both' scope).

V2 composable — facade for Panel Form Dialog: composes createFrozenFormLoad, createHandleFetchFrom, frozenFormValidate/Save, formDialogSnapshot, and useFormClientScript. Watches loading to run activateScripts() after each load and push tool tabs. Used by PanelFormDialog.vue.
V2 composable — panel integration for Panel Form Dialog: refs, open from row, close/save + panel reload; composes useFormDialogRecordNav.
Portal-action modal and row-action execution for related-doctype tabs: run_portal_action via frappeCall, exchange outcome msgprint, action modal prompt/confirm flow.
Label-column width persistence for Form Dialog related-tab schema preview: localStorage per definition+tab index, default width from longest field label, drag-resize handlers.
Composable wrapping the plain-JS frappe.require email/SMS dialog launchers (bulk + per-row). Owns the in-flight _sendDialog instance; exports closeSendDialog for teardown.
SPA page navigation — load list_spa_pages_for_ui, resolve switch_page routes.
V2 composable — Tag Finder field loading and tag generation
WP SQL read-back after Form Dialog save — poll sync job IDs, trigger linked sync, merge fresh doc into panel row.

nce_events/public/js/panel_page_v2/main..purpose: V2 SPA bundle entry point. Exposes window.NCEPanelPageV2.mount(selector, opts) — creates a fresh Vue app per mount call (so each Frappe Page gets a clean instance) and provides panelMode + panelLabel from opts so App.vue can scope the root WP Tables filter and Panel Actions list. opts.mode is 'Mirror' / 'Native' / null; opts.label is the header text.

nce_events/public/js/panel_page_v2/mount.purpose: Vite mount entry for Desk Page Panel format-rule editor (mountFormatRuleEditor on DOM host).

nce_events/public/js/panel_page_v2/nce_c.purpose: Card core — renders a Card Definition (tabs, WidgetGrid, ActionsPanel).
Card core — Teleport modal shell wrapping CardForm.
Card core — load Card Definition + record, hop paths, saveField/refresh (uses frappe.db + frappeCall).

nce_events/public/js/panel_page_v2/utils.purpose: Enrollment refund UX helpers: cancellation-fee prompt field spec, parseCancellationFeeInput, runProductRefund via execute_product_refund, outcome msgprint HTML.
Utility: maps every Frappe fieldtype string to a { component, props } config (or { layout } for structural types). Single source of truth for fieldtype→control mapping in V2 dialogs.
Build Find-mode column definitions from frozen meta searchable fields.
Match a single Find criterion against a panel row value (operators, case rules).
Display-baseline capture/diff for Form Dialog controls: read visible widget values from DOM wraps, blur focused Frappe widgets, compare without mutating formData.
Find-mode searchable field discovery from frozen form meta (isFindSearchableRootField, criterion seeds).
Desk form live-scrape and control sync: readLiveFieldValue, captureDisplayBaseline, syncWritableControlsIntoFormData, blurFocusedFrappeWidget for dialog pre-fill and save flush.
Form Dialog load debug overlay — localStorage nce_fd_load_debug=1 enables step trace rows.
Parse portal_field_config JSON into editable grid column defs for related/inline tabs.
Related-tab Go To panel — buildRelatedTabPanelFilter, canGoToRelatedPanel drill-down helper.
Section grid helpers for Form Dialog body: sectionGridRows (row-major column stacks), sectionColumnCount, visibleFormDialogSections filter.
Form dialog dirty helpers: snapshotForCompare, isFormDataDirty, scalarValuesEquivalent, isEmptyScalarValue for reactive formData comparison.
Utility: Promise wrapper for frappe.call (shared by usePanel, usePanelFormDialog stack, nce_cards/useCardForm).
Sync Frappe Date/Datetime controls with Vue reactive formData (stub doc read/write).
Utility: Frappe-style depends_on / *_depends_on evaluation and layout fieldtype list for frozen form meta.
Measure Desk navbar title anchor for aligning floating panel chrome with Desk layout.
Navigate between panel SPA Frappe Pages via frappe.set_route(slug) without full reload (preserves mounted Vue apps).
Open a DocType list view in Desk (new tab) from panel actions and form dialog links.
PANEL_CHROME_DEFAULTS + PANEL_BORDER_DEFAULTS; panelChromeBg/Border, border width/color CSS var helpers, frameBorderClasses, table/filter divider style vars for V2 runtime.
Match Page Panel Display read_only_fields against root frozen fields and related/inline child column fieldnames.
Panel table column width persistence and layout prep (preparePanelTableLayout, panelRowVal).
Parse panel action client_handler spec strings (e.g. show_dt(error-log)) into key + args.

Parse a flat Frappe DocField array into Tabs→Sections→Columns→Fields (section.collapsible from Section Break). Exports sectionHasVisibleFields for empty-section filtering. Used by useFrozenFormLoad to render frozen_meta_json layout.
Related/inline portal grid column editability: fieldtype skip set, DocType read_only, Page Panel read_only_fields (not portal_field_config.editable).
Gated V2 debug logging — localStorage nce_ppv2_debug=1 enables ppv2DebugLog/ppv2DebugWarn (readback poll, client scripts, panel actions).
Pure cell-format helpers for related-doctype portal grids: mandatory asterisk, Select options, raw/truthy/format values, editable/number/long-text column checks.
Form Dialog submit performance trace — localStorage nce_fd_submit_trace=1 logs timing lines.
Client wrapper for nce_sync per-DocType sync busy gate (isDoctypeSyncBusy, assertDoctypeNotSyncBusy).
Normalize Events doc fields before WooCommerce publish hook (normalizeDocForWooEventsPublish).
WordPress user-switch flow from panel row — familyIdFromRow, openWpUserSwitch.

nce_events/public/js/js_dialogs/ai_tools.purpose: AI tools sidebar panel (plain JS) — loaded at runtime via frappe.require() from V2 and reusable from desk forms

nce_events/public/js/js_dialogs/email_di.purpose: Email compose/send dialog (plain JS, Frappe ui.Dialog) — loaded at runtime via frappe.require() from V2 and reusable from desk forms

nce_events/public/js/js_dialogs/sms_dial.purpose: SMS compose/send dialog (plain JS, Frappe ui.Dialog) — loaded at runtime via frappe.require() from V2 and reusable from desk forms

nce_events/public/js/hierarchy_explorer/.purpose: Hierarchy Explorer configuration — which doctypes to show as hierarchies
Hierarchy Explorer state — tree data, expansion state
Hierarchy Explorer UI — tree view rendering for hierarchical doctypes
